name: PER_EDIT_NAME_SETUP_VL
query: SELECT B.EDIT_NAME_SETUP_ID, B.NAME_STYLE_ID, B.ENTERPRISE_ID, B.DISPLAY_SEQUENCE, B.COLUMN_NAME, B.REQUIRED_FLAG, T.PROMPT, B.COLUMN_LOOKUP, B.MODULE_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.SEEDED_REQUIRED_FLAG, B.SGUID SGUID, B.ACTIVE_FLAG FROM PER_EDIT_NAME_SETUP_B B, PER_EDIT_NAME_SETUP_TL T WHERE B.EDIT_NAME_SETUP_ID = T.EDIT_NAME_SETUP_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
